title: oldenlandia purpurea var. longifolia
intro: Oldenlandia purpurea var. longifolia, also known as Long-flowered Oldenlandia, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and alleviating digestive issues. Long-flowered Oldenlandia can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and dried extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
